title: Mythic Mounts
description: Mythic Mounts makes exploration essential again. It upgrades saddles found in structures with unique attributes like bonus speed, extra health, and low gravity, ensuring that looted treasures always outclass crafted gear.
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/tTTgCpWV/image.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
Since saddles became craftable, finding them in loot chests lost its spark. This datapack changes the game: saddles discovered within ancient structures now carry Attributes. They are no longer just items; they are unique artifacts that grant your mounts increased speed, extra vitality, or even the power to defy gravity. Don't just craft your journey—retrieve it from the ruins!

![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/QMpX8VFT/image.png)
